slides.headline: Streamline Your Compliance Audit
slides.body: Ensure your institution is ready for the VA audit with our comprehensive checklist.

slides.headline: Verify Eligibility
slides.body: Ensure all student veterans meet VA eligibility criteria.

slides.headline: Check Financial Aid
slides.body: Confirm all financial aid complies with VA regulations.

slides.headline: Audit Financial Records
slides.body: Ensure accurate documentation of VA funding.

slides.headline: Review Student Records
slides.body: Ensure all student records are up-to-date and accurate.

slides.headline: Compliance Documentation
slides.body: Compile all necessary documentation for the audit.

outline.caption: Ensure your VA School Certifying Officials are audit-ready with our five-step checklist. Verify eligibility, check financial aid, audit records, review student records, and compile documentation. Link in bio for more.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, Compliance Documentation, as it could benefit from a more detailed takeaway or bullet points to make it more engaging.
